name: Beef and Broccoli
description: Skip the takeout and whip up a fast and fresh recipe for Easy Beef and Broccoli in 20 minutes or less.

name: Cowboy Butter Chicken Skillet
description: It’s got everything you could want, from the buttery, herby, and zingy sauce to weeknight-friendly chicken breasts. Whether you make this for the family or for a dinner party, trust me—no one can resist the allure of cowboy butter.
